title: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

options.title: Approach
options.requires: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

notes: Choosing [gold]Approach[/gold] lets you select one Attack from your deck to enchant with [purple]Corrupted[/purple] (deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] HP when played). The option is locked if no cards in your deck are eligible for the Corrupted enchantment. Choosing [gold]Kill with Fire[/gold] lets you select 1 card from your deck to Transform into a random card.
